title: Product Search Returning Empty Results
description: Product search is broken. All search queries return 0 results regardless of search term. The search bar is functional (accepts input), but results are always empty. Started after last deployment 2 hours ago. Elasticsearch logs show query errors. Error: "No active connection to Elasticsearch cluster". Affects all users on the storefront. Customer complaints coming in rapidly.

triage_verdict.severity_reasoning: Major user-facing functionality broken, Elasticsearch connectivity issue, affects search experience but not checkout
triage_verdict.root_cause_hypothesis: Elasticsearch cluster connection lost after deployment, possible network or credential change

recommended_actions: Check Elasticsearch connection parameters in deployment config
Verify Elasticsearch cluster health and status
Check recent commits to search-elasticsearch plugin
Review deployment logs from 2 hours ago
